title: Super Mario Paint - Overworld (Mickey's Racing Adventure)
description:
Well, here we are again. I'm probably gonna end up covering the whole soundtrack eventually. And yes, I realized the modern implications of that acronym the second I finished typing it out, I just don't care.

Special thanks to Super Mario Paint for having the sustain function and making this effect possible. Also shoutouts to Vivaldi for basically being Chrome except not sucking horribly.

I still have one or two huge projects on the backburner that may or may not ever see the light of day, but this was a quickie to try and keep myself sane in the meantime.
